name: Pulse Evolution Corporation
summary: Pulse Evolution Corporation develops computer-generated human likeness applications for utilization in education, health care, telecommunications, defense, transportation, and entertainment industries. It develops virtual humans for live shows, virtual reality, augmented reality, holographic, 3D stereoscopic, Web, mobile, interactive, and artificial intelligence applications. The company is headquartered in Port St. Lucie, Florida. As of August 6, 2018, Pulse Evolution Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Evolution|AI Corporation.
